title: ES-MADM III: Final Computational Package
description: This record provides the final computational package supporting the ES-MADM III framework, a preference-conditioned fuzzy entropy-synergy model for multi-attribute decision diagnostics and robust ranking under uncertainty. The package includes the final R/Shiny implementation, scenario-specific Excel input workbooks, consolidated computational outputs, manuscript figure-generation scripts, and a non-mathematical workflow overview intended to support transparent computational reproducibility.

creators.name: Kiratsoudis, Sideris

creators.affiliation: Department of Physics, Faculty of Sciences, Democritus University of Thrace, Kavala, Greece

notes: This archive corresponds to the final computational package used to reproduce the ES-MADM III manuscript case-study results, benchmark comparison, diagnostic outputs, and manuscript figures. Earlier development versions, obsolete scripts, draft model files, and superseded outputs are intentionally excluded.
